title: Powerhouse Connect runtime configuration
description: Runtime configuration loaded by Connect at boot from /powerhouse.config.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete. Set to the GitHub-hosted schema URL.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Must match the SPA bundle that ships with this dist. The SPA throws on mismatch to prevent SPA/config skew.

packages.description: Powerhouse packages this Connect instance loads at runtime.

version.description: Exact version (registry providers) or omit to take latest.

provider.description: Where Connect should resolve the package from at runtime.

url.description: Override URL for non-registry providers (e.g. github tarball).

localPackage.description: Identity of the consumer project itself, captured at build time. null for Docker images and other generic deploys with no host project.

connect.description: Connect-specific UI customisations. All fields optional; omit the section entirely for default behaviour.

appName.description: Browser tab title and any in-app brand text. Defaults to 'Powerhouse Connect'.

homeBackground.description: Optional hero image on the empty home screen. Provide AVIF for the modern path and a PNG/JPG fallback.

avif.description: URL or path to AVIF asset (preferred).

png.description: URL or path to PNG/JPG fallback.

allowAddDrive.description: When false, the SPA hides the 'add drive' affordance. Defaults to true.

defaultDrives.description: Drives the SPA auto-connects to on first load. Each must specify a URL; name and icon are optional overrides.
